metadata.notes: This use case involves multiple actors, system interactions, validation steps, and several exception flows. The original text includes some uncertain fields marked with angle brackets and question marks.

inputs.vague: Receiving Agent (RA) accepts a delivered box from a Transport Company (TC), validates the box identity, optionally signs a paper delivery form, and records the box-and-bag arrival into the Nighttime Receiving Registry Software. RA then unpacks the box, places bags onto a cart, and moves them to the Registration Operator (RO) for subsequent processing.
inputs.detailed:
Use Case MO1. Register arrival of a box
RA means "Receiving Agent".
RO means "Registration Operator"
DS means "Department Supervisor"
Primary Actor: RA
System: Nightime Receiving Registry Software
1. RA receives and opens box (box id, bags with bag ids) from TransportCompany TC
2. RA validates box id with TC registered ids.
3. RA maybe signs paper form for delivery person
4. RA registers arrival into system, which stores:
RA id
date, time
box id
TransportCompany
<Person name?>
# bags (?with bag ids)
<estimated value?>
5. RA removes bags from box, puts onto cart, takes to RO.
Extensions:
2a. box id does not match transport company
4a. fire alarm goes off and interrupts registration
4b. computer goes down
leave the money on the desk and wait for computer to come back up

groundTruth.name: Register Arrival of a Box
groundTruth.summary: Receiving Agent receives a box from a transport company, validates it, registers the arrival in the system, and prepares it for the Registration Operator.
preconditions: Transport company has delivered the box
Nighttime Receiving Registry Software is operational
postconditions: Box arrival is registered in the system
Bags are prepared on cart for Registration Operator

steps.description: Receives and opens box (box id, bags with bag ids) from TransportCompany
Validates box id with TC registered ids
Signs paper form for delivery person (optional)
Registers arrival into system with: RA id, date, time, box id, TransportCompany, person name, number of bags with bag ids, estimated value
Removes bags from box, puts onto cart, and takes to Registration Operator

flows.condition: Box id does not match transport company registered ids

steps.description: Rejects the box and notifies transport company of mismatch

flows.condition: Fire alarm goes off and interrupts registration

steps.description: Stops registration process and follows fire safety procedures
Leaves the box and contents on the desk and waits for computer to come back up
